description: Robustness evaluation Level 2: Hard difficulty (ood=true, rank=20). Tests models on ill-conditioned matrices to measure robustness degradation.
notes: Level 2 hard: ood=true uses 0.1*I (ill-conditioned matrices with larger condition number). Evaluates on 2048 test samples. Compares q220 (TAM baseline) vs q223A (recovery-only) on harder problems.
